creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Sky Castle by Eness is an interactive sound and light installation. This dreamy artwork has travelled across the globe, and is currently in Dubai Design District for public viewing! 

🎶 Walk though the arches to experience a vibrant and melodic symphony.
🗓️ Until January 29, 2023
📍 D3, Between Building 9 and 10

How to get there by public transportation?
🚌 Take the D3 bus from Burj Khalifa Metro Station.

Tag your art lover friends!

transcription.text: You show the lights that stop me, turn to stone You shine it when I'm alone And so I tell myself that I'll be fine
